title: Spoof email "sent by" & "reply to"  fields in emails sent by integrations/automations
excerpt:
Currently emails sent by the Outlook integration have “sent by” & “reply to” set to the account linked when setting up the Outlook integration. 
Oftentimes this is an individual’s user account which is not appropriate fo…

posts.author: MarkJo (Mark Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently emails sent by the Outlook integration have “sent by” & “reply to” set to the account linked when setting up the Outlook integration.

Oftentimes this is an individual’s user account which is not appropriate for certain communications. Having the facility to have the emails appear to come from another email address (usually a generic shared email inbox) would have huge advantages for a number of use cases.
